name: afropedia
description: Afropedia monorepo — Next.js frontend + NestJS backend

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && (npm run dev --workspace=apps/web & npm run dev --workspace=apps/api)
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
